languages.text: Но мудрость Бога-Императора все еще оставалась со мной. Вокс-аугмент, заменивший мою гортань, стократ усилил мой голос, заставив его возвыситься над погребальной песнью гробницы, однако этого оказалось недостаточно. Увы, лишь немногие нашли в себе силы воспрять — ужас парализовал людей, лишив их последних сил и любой надежды на спасение.

Yet the wisdom of the God-Emperor was still with me. The vox-augment that had replaced my throat amplified my voice a hundredfold, letting it drown out the crypt's dirge — but it was not enough. Alas, only a few mustered the strength to rally, with the rest still paralysed by the terror that had drained the last of their strength and snuffed out all hope for salvation.
languages.original_text: Но мудрость Бога-Императора все еще оставалась со мной. Вокс-аугмент, заменивший мою гортань, стократ усилил мой голос, заставив его возвыситься над погребальной песнью гробницы, однако этого оказалось недостаточно. Увы, лишь немногие нашли в себе силы воспрять — ужас парализовал людей, лишив их последних сил и любой надежды на спасение.

traits.locale_text: Yet the wisdom of the God-Emperor was still with me. The vox-augment that had replaced my throat amplified my voice a hundredfold, letting it drown out the crypt's dirge — but it was not enough. Alas, only a few mustered the strength to rally, with the rest still paralysed by the terror that had drained the last of their strength and snuffed out all hope for salvation.

Yet the wisdom of the Omnissiah was still with me. The vox-augment that had replaced my throat amplified my voice a hundredfold, making it drown out the crypt's dirge — but it was not enough. Alas, only a few mustered the strength to rally, the rest still paralysed by the terror that had drained the last of their strength and snuffed out all hope for salvation.

Yet the wisdom of the Omnissiah was still with me. The vox-augment that had replaced my throat amplified my voice a hundredfold, letting it drown out the crypt's dirge — but it was not enough. Alas, only a few mustered the strength to rally, with the rest still paralysed by the terror that had drained the last of their strength and snuffed out all hope for salvation.

Yet the wisdom of the Omnissiah was still with me. The vox-augment that had replaced my throat amplified my voice a hundredfold, letting it drown out the crypt's dirge — but it was not enough. Alas, only a few mustered the strength to rally, with the rest still paralysed by the terror that had drained the last of their strength and snuffed out all hope for salvation.

Yet the wisdom of the God-Emperor was still with me. The vox-augment that had replaced my throat amplified my voice a hundredfold, letting it drown out the crypt's dirge — but it was not enough. Alas, only a few mustered the strength to rally, with the rest still paralysed by the terror that had drained the last of their strength and snuffed out all hope for salvation.

languages.text: Sin embargo, la sabiduría del Dios Emperador aún me acompañaba. El voco-aumento que había sustituido mi garganta amplificó mi voz cien veces, permitiendo que ahogara el sonido de la cripta. Lamentablemente solo unos pocos lograron sobreponerse, mientras que el resto seguía paralizado por el terror que drenaba sus ganas de vivir y sofocaba toda esperanza de salvación.
languages.original_text: Yet the wisdom of the God-Emperor was still with me. The vox-augment that had replaced my throat amplified my voice a hundredfold, letting it drown out the crypt's dirge — but it was not enough. Alas, only a few mustered the strength to rally, with the rest still paralysed by the terror that had drained the last of their strength and snuffed out all hope for salvation.

traits.locale_text: Sin embargo, la sabiduría del Dios Emperador aún me acompañaba. El voco-aumento que había sustituido mi garganta amplificó mi voz cien veces, permitiendo que ahogara el sonido de la cripta. Lamentablemente solo unos pocos lograron sobreponerse, mientras que el resto seguía paralizado por el terror que drenaba sus ganas de vivir y sofocaba toda esperanza de salvación.

languages.text: Pourtant, j'étais encore habité par la sagesse de l'Empereur-Dieu. L'augmentation-vox qui remplace ma gorge amplifiait ma voix au centuple, lui permettant de couvrir le chant funèbre de la crypte. Mais ce ne fut pas suffisant. Hélas, seuls quelques-uns trouvèrent la force de me suivre. Les autres restèrent paralysés par la terreur, tout espoir de salut anéanti.
languages.original_text: Yet the wisdom of the God-Emperor was still with me. The vox-augment that had replaced my throat amplified my voice a hundredfold, letting it drown out the crypt's dirge — but it was not enough. Alas, only a few mustered the strength to rally, with the rest still paralysed by the terror that had drained the last of their strength and snuffed out all hope for salvation.

traits.locale_text: Pourtant, j'étais encore habité par la sagesse de l'Empereur-Dieu. L'augmentation-vox qui remplace ma gorge amplifiait ma voix au centuple, lui permettant de couvrir le chant funèbre de la crypte. Mais ce ne fut pas suffisant. Hélas, seuls quelques-uns trouvèrent la force de me suivre. Les autres restèrent paralysés par la terreur, tout espoir de salut anéanti.

languages.text: 然而神皇的智慧仍与我同在。替代我喉咙的音阵植入物将我的声音放大了百倍，压过了墓穴的挽歌——只可惜这还不够。唉，唯有少数人能奋力振作，其余人等都被恐惧抽干了最后一丝力量，磨灭了所有希望。他们瘫在原地，动弹不得。
languages.original_text: Yet the wisdom of the God-Emperor was still with me. The vox-augment that had replaced my throat amplified my voice a hundredfold, letting it drown out the crypt's dirge — but it was not enough. Alas, only a few mustered the strength to rally, with the rest still paralysed by the terror that had drained the last of their strength and snuffed out all hope for salvation.

traits.locale_text: 然而神皇的智慧仍与我同在。替代我喉咙的音阵植入物将我的声音放大了百倍，压过了墓穴的挽歌——只可惜这还不够。唉，唯有少数人能奋力振作，其余人等都被恐惧抽干了最后一丝力量，磨灭了所有希望。他们瘫在原地，动弹不得。

languages.text: Doch die Weisheit des Gottimperators war noch immer bei mir. Die Voxaugmentation, die meinen Kehlkopf ersetzte, verstärkte meine Stimme hundertfach und übertöne den Leichengesang der Krypta ... aber das war nicht genug. Leider brachten nur wenige die Kraft auf, mir zu folgen. Die anderen waren noch von dem Schrecken gelähmt, der ihnen den letzten Rest ihrer Stärke und jede Hoffnung geraubt hatte.
languages.original_text: Yet the wisdom of the God-Emperor was still with me. The vox-augment that had replaced my throat amplified my voice a hundredfold, letting it drown out the crypt's dirge — but it was not enough. Alas, only a few mustered the strength to rally, with the rest still paralysed by the terror that had drained the last of their strength and snuffed out all hope for salvation.

traits.locale_text: Doch die Weisheit des Gottimperators war noch immer bei mir. Die Voxaugmentation, die meinen Kehlkopf ersetzte, verstärkte meine Stimme hundertfach und übertöne den Leichengesang der Krypta ... aber das war nicht genug. Leider brachten nur wenige die Kraft auf, mir zu folgen. Die anderen waren noch von dem Schrecken gelähmt, der ihnen den letzten Rest ihrer Stärke und jede Hoffnung geraubt hatte.

languages.text: Yine de Tanrı İmparator'un bilgeliği hâlâ benimleydi. Boğazımın yerini alan voks ogmenti, sesimi yüz kat güçlendirerek mahzenin ağıdını bastırmasını sağladı. Fakat bu yeterli olmadı. Ne yazık ki sadece birkaçı toparlanma gücünü bulabildi. Kalanlar, son güçlerini tüketen ve kurtuluş umutlarını söndüren dehşet yüzünden hâlâ felç olmuş durumdaydı.
languages.original_text: Yet the wisdom of the God-Emperor was still with me. The vox-augment that had replaced my throat amplified my voice a hundredfold, letting it drown out the crypt's dirge — but it was not enough. Alas, only a few mustered the strength to rally, with the rest still paralysed by the terror that had drained the last of their strength and snuffed out all hope for salvation.

traits.locale_text: Yine de Tanrı İmparator'un bilgeliği hâlâ benimleydi. Boğazımın yerini alan voks ogmenti, sesimi yüz kat güçlendirerek mahzenin ağıdını bastırmasını sağladı. Fakat bu yeterli olmadı. Ne yazık ki sadece birkaçı toparlanma gücünü bulabildi. Kalanlar, son güçlerini tüketen ve kurtuluş umutlarını söndüren dehşet yüzünden hâlâ felç olmuş durumdaydı.

languages.text: しかし、神皇帝の知恵は私をまだ守っていた。喉を代えたヴォックス・増幅器は私の声を百倍に増幅し、墓所の哀歌を消し去った。しかし、それは十分ではなかった。残念だが、わずかな数しか恐怖から立ち上がることができず、残りは恐怖に打ちのめされ、最後の力を失い、救済への希望を絶たれていた。
languages.original_text: Yet the wisdom of the God-Emperor was still with me. The vox-augment that had replaced my throat amplified my voice a hundredfold, letting it drown out the crypt's dirge — but it was not enough. Alas, only a few mustered the strength to rally, with the rest still paralysed by the terror that had drained the last of their strength and snuffed out all hope for salvation.

traits.locale_text: しかし、神皇帝の知恵は私をまだ守っていた。喉を代えたヴォックス・増幅器は私の声を百倍に増幅し、墓所の哀歌を消し去った。しかし、それは十分ではなかった。残念だが、わずかな数しか恐怖から立ち上がることができず、残りは恐怖に打ちのめされ、最後の力を失い、救済への希望を絶たれていた。
